grant_type.description: Denotes the flow you are using. For Token Exchange for Native Social, use urn:ietf:params:oauth:grant-type:token-exchange.

subject_token.description: Externally-issued identity artifact, representing the user.

subject_token_type.description: Identifier that indicates the type of subject_token. Currently supported native social values are: http://auth0.com/oauth/token-type/apple-authz-code.

audience.description: The unique identifier of the target API you want to access.

scope.description: String value of the different scopes the application is requesting. Multiple scopes are separated with whitespace.

user_profile.description: Optional element used for native iOS interactions for which profile updates can occur. Expected parameter value will be JSON in the form of: { name: { firstName: 'John', lastName: 'Smith }}
